sentence: 工人们正在装配新型发动机。
english: The workers are assembling the new engine.

sentence: 这款手机有内置的翻译功能。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī yǒu nèizhì de fānyì gōngnéng.
english: This phone has a built-in translation feature.

sentence: 货车满载着蔬菜驶向市场。
pinyin: Huòchē mǎn zài zhe shūcài shǐ xiàng shìchǎng.
english: The truck was fully loaded with vegetables heading to the market.

sentence: 纪录片里的炮火场面让人震惊。
pinyin: Jìlùpiàn lǐ de pàohuǒ chǎngmiàn ràng rén zhènjīng.
english: The artillery fire scenes in the documentary were shocking.

sentence: 这个传感器能侦测到微小的气体泄漏。
pinyin: Zhège chuángǎnqì néng zhēncè dào wēixiǎo de qìtǐ xìlòu.
english: This sensor can detect even tiny gas leaks.
